validate.notes: Environment-level blocker: Bash tool itself fails with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/home/worker/.claude/session-env'` before any command executes. Previous validate run (kimi-k2p5-turbo, 2026-04-something) reported pass with nop=0/gold=1 — that result still stands at the file level, but this run could not re-verify it.
